S.FORM: Ron Behagen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 1, Ron Behagen, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ron Œ≤eƒßa…£en s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ron Œ≤eƒßa…£en, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
